description: Swap-time parameter bridge alias map (Item 2). Maps common native / legacy / manufacturer parameter NAMES to the STING shared-parameter NAME they should populate. When a seed instance is swapped to a manufacturer family that carries a value under a legacy name (e.g. 'Mounting Height'), the bridge copies it into the matching STING shared parameter (resolved to its GUID via ParamRegistry) ONLY when that STING parameter is currently empty — never clobbering a real value. Unknown native params are left untouched. Keep this list small and well-known. Project override: <project>/_BIM_COORD/param_alias_map.json (merged by native name; project wins).
